name_cn:
POCHETTE MÉTIS Handbag #️⃣M44876
Exclusive global launch! This item is custom-made according to Chanel's French production specifications with dynamic chip re-coding. Features original factory exclusive fabric and original factory exclusive light gold electroplated full steel hardware (color matches authentic).
Please compare with the authentic French version!
We ensure a 100% authentic feel! Exclusive original factory fabric, hardware, edge oil, stitching + authentic craftsmanship + official website's latest complete gift box.
25 x 19 x 7 cm
(Length x Height x Width)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Fabric lining
Hardware
S-lock closure
Zippered exterior pocket
Interior pocket
Strap: Removable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 48.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 55.0 cm
Handle: Single handle
Made in France
